meta.source: Notebook-faithful weighted Ideal Point from _recovery/points_ideal_weighted_full.csv (senat_ideal_point_model_R_simple.ipynb pipeline: pscl::ideal d=2 seed=123 maxiter=1000 burnin=500 thin=25, notebook orientation/scale; NOT ideal_point_r export)
meta.model: pscl::ideal d=2 seed=123 maxiter=1000 burnin=500 thin=25

orientation.dim1: Flip so mean(SOC,CRC,GEST) < mean(UMP,UC,RTLI); negative = gauche, positive = droite
orientation.dim2: No sign flip in notebook; RDPI (LREM) high = haut on plot; 3D: haut/loin outer tiers, bas/proche présidente
